title: All with You
description: Adds simple backpacks that fit perfectly into vanilla minecraft!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aa635d5a262a0b74eade9d244e81c31119df595.png)

## **All with You** is a simple mod that adds a vanilla-style backpack!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PKNAj5U89m8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

(in video I also used No Man's Land and Farmer's Delight)


In terms of functionality, the backpack itself resembles a bundle, but it’s been significantly improved, making it a convenient accessory for gameplay.

![Backpack in Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b0b5bdf6cb2922d34054c4cd7f17244de701b26.png)

The backpack can hold up to 4 stacks of various items, and you can also wear it, which unlocks additional features.

If you press Alt + Q, you can immediately pack items into your equipped backpack.

But keep in mind that if you have more than two backpacks with items in your inventory, this will have a negative effect.
